Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0AE5 "THEWITCHSCAULDRON-C000-0AE5" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Witch's Cauldron, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $C000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
